sources.title: TARZAN AND THE SLAVE GIRL 1950 Colorized
sources.description: As Jane and the local tribeswomen are abducted one by one by the wild Lionians, Tarzan attempts to persuade their prince to accept a potent medicament for his ailing men, while the girls face certain death. Can Tarzan set them free?

metadata.Plot: The Lionians are a tribe dying of a mysterious disease. Their Chief decides to kidnap Jane and Lola, a half-breed nurse, in order to help repopulate his civilization. Tarzan must rescue them while fending off blowgun attacks from people called the Waddies who are disguised as bushes.
metadata.Writer: Hans Jacoby, Arnold Belgard, Edgar Rice Burroughs
metadata.Actors: Lex Barker, Vanessa Brown, Robert Alda
